company: Pro-Active Cyber Security - Protect Your Business | Cyber Dacians
summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Dacians is a cybersecurity company offering a full range of services including penetration testing, red teaming, compliance (HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST, PCI-DSS, GDPR), defensive services (vCISO, cloud security, hardening), and strategic consulting for government agencies.
